name: opentitan-rv-dm
description: OpenTitan RISC-V Debug Module (rv_dm). Implements RISC-V Debug Spec 0.13 with JTAG TAP (default) or TL-UL-based DMI (UseDmiInterface=1). Exposes two TL-UL slave regions (regs at +0x0, mem/ROM+buffer at +0x800), one TL-UL host port for system bus access (sba), and a per-hart debug_req/unavailable interface to the CPU. Integrated with OpenTitan lifecycle controller, alert_handler, OTP, and RACL.

interfaces.description: System clock
Lifecycle-controller clock. Declared so that topgen connects the correct clk/rst domains; can be tied to clk_i for single-domain integrations.
Async active-low reset — connect to power-on reset (NOT system reset)
Async active-low lifecycle reset — only used for NDM reset tracking
Async active-low scan-mode reset
SEC_CM LC_HW_DEBUG_CLR.INTERSIG.MUBI — lifecycle signal clearing HW debug state
SEC_CM LC_HW_DEBUG_EN.INTERSIG.MUBI — HW debug lifecycle enable (live, from lifecycle controller)
SEC_CM LC_DFT_EN.INTERSIG.MUBI — DFT lifecycle enable
HW debug lifecycle enable (latched version from pinmux, only used for JTAG/TAP gating)
Lifecycle-check-bypass enable
Lifecycle escalation enable
Lifecycle init-done indicator — used to clear NDM latch after LC re-initialization
Strap sampling enable
Strap sampling enable override
SEC_CM OTP_DIS_RV_DM_LATE_DEBUG.INTERSIG.MUBI — disablement signal from OTP HW_CFG1 partition
Scan-mode indicator (multi-bit unknown-safe encoded)
Static word address of the next debug module in the debug chain (0x0 means this is the leaf)
Non-debug module reset request (to CPU/system reset tree)
Debug module is active — gates debug functionality
Async per-hart debug request to CPU
Per-hart availability indicator (1 = hart unavailable, e.g. powered down)
TL-UL slave — CSR access (dmcontrol/dmstatus/abstractcs/command/etc.). Typically at debug_module.base_address + 0x0.
TL-UL slave — debug ROM + program buffer for execution-based debug. Typically at debug_module.base_address + 0x800.
TL-UL slave — TL-UL-based DMI alternative to JTAG. Only active when UseDmiInterface=1. Tie off for JTAG-only integrations.
TL-UL host — System Bus Access for debugger-initiated memory R/W. Wire as an additional xbar host.
Alert handler RX (differential diff-pair encoded). Tie off safely for integrations without alert_handler.
Alert handler TX (differential diff-pair encoded)
RACL policy vector input (top_racl_pkg::racl_policy_vec_t). Tie to '0 when EnableRacl=0.
RACL error log output (top_racl_pkg::racl_error_log_t)
JTAG TAP request struct (jtag_pkg::jtag_req_t) — contains tck, tms, tdi, trst_n. Unpack at top-wrapper boundary to 4 physical pins.
JTAG TAP response struct (jtag_pkg::jtag_rsp_t) — contains tdo, tdo_oe. Unpack at top-wrapper boundary.

parameters.name: IdcodeValue
parameters.description: 32-bit IDCODE register value reported on JTAG. Typically encodes (manufacturer ID, design ID, version).

parameters.name: UseDmiInterface
parameters.description: Enable TL-UL-based DMI on dbg_tl_d port as alternative to JTAG TAP. 0 = JTAG-only (default).

parameters.name: SecVolatileRawUnlockEn
parameters.description: Enable volatile RAW-unlock debug escape — production OFF.

parameters.name: AlertAsyncOn
parameters.description: Per-alert async clock-crossing mode. Default: all alerts treated as async.

parameters.name: AlertSkewCycles
parameters.description: Number of cycles differential skew tolerated on alert signals

parameters.name: TlulHostUserRsvdBits
parameters.description: Reserved user bits on TL-UL host (sba) a_user struct

parameters.name: EnableRacl
parameters.description: Enable Register Access Control Logic (RACL) policy enforcement

parameters.name: RaclErrorRsp
parameters.description: Return TL-UL error response on RACL violation (defaults to EnableRacl)

parameters.name: RaclPolicySelVecRegs
parameters.description: RACL policy selection vector, one entry per CSR in the regs block

parameters.name: NrHarts
parameters.description: From rv_dm_reg_pkg — number of harts the debug module supports. 1 for single-core Ibex.

parameters.name: NumAlerts
parameters.description: From rv_dm_reg_pkg — number of alerts emitted by this IP

features: RISC-V Debug Spec 0.13 compliant debug module
Two TL-UL slave regions: regs (dmcontrol/dmstatus/abstract) and mem (debug ROM + program buffer)
TL-UL host port (sba) for system bus access — debugger-initiated memory R/W
NDM reset request output to CPU/system reset tree
OpenTitan lifecycle controller integration (7 lc_ctrl_mubi4 inputs)
Register Access Control Logic (RACL) policy enforcement

dependencies.name: rv_dm_reg_pkg
dependencies.description: This IP's own register package — defines NumRegsRegs, NumAlerts, NrHarts

dependencies.name: jtag_pkg
dependencies.description: JTAG TAP struct types (jtag_req_t / jtag_rsp_t) — included in this IP at rtl/jtag_pkg.sv

dependencies.name: tlul_pkg
dependencies.description: TileLink UL protocol package (tl_h2d_t / tl_d2h_t, RsvdWidth). Source: vyges-ip/opentitan-tlul

dependencies.name: lc_ctrl_pkg
dependencies.description: OpenTitan lifecycle controller package — lc_tx_t, On, Off constants. Source: lowRISC/opentitan/hw/ip/lc_ctrl/rtl/lc_ctrl_pkg.sv (NOT yet mirrored to vyges-ip)

dependencies.name: prim_mubi_pkg
dependencies.description: OpenTitan multi-bit unknown-safe encoding — mubi4_t, mubi8_t, MuBi4True/False, MuBi8True/False. Source: vyges-ip/opentitan-prim

dependencies.name: prim_alert_pkg
dependencies.description: OpenTitan alert_handler RX/TX diff-pair encoding — alert_rx_t, alert_tx_t. Source: vyges-ip/opentitan-prim

dependencies.name: top_racl_pkg
dependencies.description: OpenTitan-top RACL types — racl_policy_vec_t, racl_policy_sel_t, racl_error_log_t. Source: lowRISC/opentitan/hw/top_earlgrey/rtl/top_racl_pkg.sv (NOT yet mirrored to vyges-ip; soc-generator emits a skeleton)

dependencies.name: prim_reg_we_check
dependencies.description: Primitive register write-enable checker. Source: vyges-ip/opentitan-prim

dependencies.name: prim_subreg_ext
dependencies.description: Extended primitive sub-register module. Source: vyges-ip/opentitan-prim
